$description: NXT1 Semantic Design Tokens - Theme-aware aliases that reference primitives

badge.$description: Notification badge colors - used for unread indicators

glass.$description: iOS 26 Liquid Glass tokens - Premium frosted UI

bg.$description: Liquid glass background - slightly more opaque for better contrast

bgSolid.$description: Solid glass variant for better readability

backdropStrong.$description: Stronger blur for iOS 26 liquid glass effect

glowActive.$description: Outer glow gradient for active state

primary.$description: Darker for better contrast on light

glass.$description: iOS 26 Liquid Glass tokens for light theme

bg.$description: Liquid glass background for light theme

bgSolid.$description: Solid glass variant for light theme

backdropStrong.$description: Stronger blur for iOS 26 liquid glass effect

fab.$description: Floating Action Button tokens for light theme

navigation.$description: Navigation component shadow tokens for light theme

tab.$description: Tab bar component tokens for light theme

icon.$description: Icon color tokens for light theme

pill.$description: Pill tab bar tokens for light theme

ripple.$description: Touch ripple effect color for light theme

sport-football.$description: Football theme - Field green & gridiron aesthetic

sport-basketball.$description: Basketball theme - Hardwood court & orange ball aesthetic

sport-baseball.$description: Baseball theme - Classic American blue & red aesthetic

sport-soccer.$description: Soccer theme - Red & black pitch energy

sport-softball.$description: Softball theme - Yellow ball & red accents aesthetic

ring.$description: Focus ring color for softball theme

sport-ice-hockey.$description: Ice hockey theme - Ice blue with deep navy contrast

sport-tennis.$description: Tennis theme - Neon court green with clean contrast

sport-golf.$description: Golf theme - Augusta green with elegant gold accents

sport-swimming-diving.$description: Swimming & diving theme - Aquatic cyan and deep-water navy

sport-wrestling.$description: Wrestling theme - Championship crimson and strong graphite

sport-gymnastics.$description: Gymnastics theme - Violet energy with polished contrast

sport-rowing.$description: Rowing theme - River blue with metallic slate accents

team.$description: Team theme - Dynamic team branding (uses CSS custom properties for runtime customization)

primary.$description: Team primary color - set dynamically via --team-primary

secondary.$description: Team secondary color - set dynamically via --team-secondary

onPrimary.$description: Text color on primary - set based on primary color brightness
